project_type: Next.js 15 monorepo with React Native/Expo mobile app
build_system: npm workspaces + turbo. Web app uses Next.js App Router, mobile uses Expo Router.
verification_instructions: 1. Run TypeScript compilation check: cd apps/web && npx tsc --noEmit. 2. Run next build to verify all routes compile.
snapshot_or_generated_files: Prisma client generated from apps/web/prisma/schema.prisma via prisma generate. Must run before build.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET mode. No database available for runtime tests - use TypeScript type-checking and build validation only. No .env file so prisma generate will need DATABASE_URL stub.
contribution_requirements: All mobile API routes go under apps/web/app/api/mobile/v1/. Use authenticateMobileRequest from @/lib/mobile-auth for auth. Return JSON responses via NextResponse.
key_patterns: 1. Mobile routes use authenticateMobileRequest(request) returning {userId, role} or null. 2. Role checks use array includes. 3. Routes return NextResponse.json(). 4. Dynamic routes use params: Promise<{id: string}> pattern (Next.js 15). 5. Existing web routes at /api/delivery/*, /api/reports/*, /api/feature-flags already have business logic - mobile routes are wrappers with mobile auth. 6. Web delivery routes use authenticateDeliveryPartnerRequest from @/lib/hybrid-auth which already supports mobile Bearer tokens.
directory_structure: / - monorepo root with apps/web (Next.js), apps/mobile-staff (Expo), packages/shared. Mobile API routes at apps/web/app/api/mobile/v1/. Web admin routes at apps/web/app/api/admin/. Delivery routes at apps/web/app/api/delivery/. Reports at apps/web/app/api/reports/.
